query:
SELECT id, file_name, target_folder, target_subpath, mime_type, error_message,
       created_at, pushed_at,
       CASE WHEN content_text IS NULL THEN 'no' ELSE 'yes' END AS has_content,
       CASE WHEN file_url IS NULL THEN 'no' ELSE 'yes' END AS has_url
FROM drive_push_queue
WHERE status = 'pending'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT id, file_name, target_folder, target_subpath, mime_type, error_message,
       created_at, pushed_at,
       CASE WHEN content_text IS NULL THEN 'no' ELSE 'yes' END AS has_content,
       CASE WHEN file_url IS NULL THEN 'no' ELSE 'yes' END AS has_url
FROM drive_push_queue
WHERE status = 'pending'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
